# Tattoo Agent

> The all-in-one business tool built for independent tattoo artists. Website, booking, payments, messaging, marketing, and CRM in one tool.

Tattoo Agent (tattooagent.art) helps independent tattoo artists run their business from one place. It replaces the manual processes most artists use — Instagram DMs for booking, Venmo for deposits, phone calendars for scheduling — with a single integrated tool.

## Key Facts

- Product: All-in-one business management tool for tattoo artists
- Website: https://tattooagent.art
- Pricing: Artist Essentials at $99/month + $500 one-time setup fee (waived with annual prepay)
- Founder: Garrett McClellan (MS Biomedical Engineering, Georgia Tech)
- Industry Advisor: Kipling McClellan (professional tattoo artist)
- Location: Holladay, Utah
- No percentage cut on bookings — artists keep 100% minus standard Stripe fees (2.9% + $0.30)
- Target audience: Independent tattoo artists (not studios/shops)
- Setup: Most artists are live within a week

## Plans

- Artist Essentials ($99/month) — Available now
- Artist Growth ($399/month) — Coming later in 2026
- Artist Pro+ ($1,499/month) — Coming later in 2026

## Detailed Information

For comprehensive product details, features, pricing, and FAQs see: /llms-full.txt
